name: Hot Spiced Cider
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cider, sugar and spices in a large saucepan.
2. Heat slowly to boiling.
3. Boil for 3-5 minutes.
4. Remove the spices.
5. Serve hot garnished with orange slices, lemon slices, or rings of unpared red apple with whole cloves forced through peel.
16 servings.
If desired, chill spiced cider and serve over ice cubes made from apple juice.
